name: zhushen-game
description: 诸神终应知晓玩家自制史记 Android 与桌面应用

scripts.prebuild:meta: npm run assets:manifest && node scripts/generate-build-info.js && node scripts/generate-changelog.js
scripts.build: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && node scripts/build-android.js debug
scripts.build:release: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && node scripts/build-android.js release
scripts.desktop:win: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && electron-builder --win dir --x64
scripts.desktop:win:portable: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && electron-builder --win portable --x64
scripts.desktop:linux: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && electron-builder --linux AppImage zip --x64
scripts.desktop:mac: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64
scripts.installer-shell:win: npm run verify && npm run prebuild:meta && electron-builder --win dir --x64 && electron-builder --config launcher-shell/electron-builder.json --win dir --x64 && node scripts/build-installer-shell.js
